OK so for `array_filler`, the inner element becomes an ImplicitInitExpr in our list. When we encounter an ImplicitInitExpr with array type, we need to recursively zero-init. Let me handle this in EmitIR.

Now I'll write the full EmitIR. Let me be comprehensive:
